## Finding Details

- **BUG-ID from report:**
- **Severity:** (Low / Medium / Critical)
- **Category:** (logic / security / error-handling / etc.)
- **File + line:**

## Why it's a false positive

Explain why this finding is incorrect. Include the relevant code if possible.

## Which agent failed?

- [ ] Hunter reported it incorrectly
- [ ] Skeptic should have caught it but didn't
- [ ] Referee confirmed it when it shouldn't have

## Suggested fix

How should the prompts or exclusion rules be updated to prevent this?
